content:
✨ alt-sendme | TypeScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: Direct, secure, and unrestricted file and folder transfers between users without intermediaries or cloud storage.
✨ Key Features: • Send anywhere (local networks or continents) • Peer-to-peer direct transfer (no cloud) • End-to-end encryption (QUIC + TLS 1.3) • No accounts or personal info required • Transfer anything (any size, any format)
📖 Summary: AltSendme is a free, open-source, and privacy-focused tool for direct peer-to-peer file transfers. It enables users to send any file or folder of any size across the globe without relying on cloud storage, ensuring end-to-end encryption and no account requirements.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
